results.title: Five child marriages stopped through court-issued injunctions on a single day in Rajasthan’s Sikar
results.description: Five child marriages were successfully prevented in Sikar, Rajasthan, through court injunctions, showcasing effective child rights enforcement.

results.title: Sonam Wangchuk enters day 20 of hunger strike, doctors warn of organ failure
results.description: Sonam Wangchuk has entered the 20th day of his indefinite hunger strike. Doctors warn prolonged fasting could affect vital organs, while the Delhi High Court has ordered daily health monitoring.

results.title: Federal judge sides with Warner
results.description: CHARLESTON – A federal judge told the U.S. Department of Justice that it had no right to West Virginia’s unredacted voter registration files. In a memorandum opinion and order released Monday afternoon, U.S. District Judge Thomas E. Johnston denied a motion made by the Department of Justice (DOJ) in February lawsuit against Secretary of State [...]

results.title: House Republicans Fracture Over $95B Iran War Funding and SAVE Act Bundling
results.description: House Republicans unveiled a $95 billion Iran War and SAVE Act package Thursday, triggering a revolt from deficit hawks. Warren Davidson warned three members would kill the bill over its lack of spending offsets.

results.title: India News | Uttarakhand: Congress Leader Amar Mehta Dies at Bannu School Ground During Preparations for 'Chhatron Ki Goonj'
results.description: Get latest articles and stories on India at LatestLY. A Congress worker died after an iron cutter fell on his head during preparations for Leader of the Opposition in the Lok Sabha Rahul Gandhi's "Chhatron Ki Goonj" programme at Bannu School Ground in Dehradun on Thursday, the Uttarakhand Pradesh Congress Committee (PCC) said.
